default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss content strategy, prioritize tasks, and address SEO challenges for Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Completed business credit card articles; focus shifting to content refreshes and new priorities](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Brex's success with Growth-X system prompts strategy adjustment for Ramp's content](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [New priorities: (1) Ali's high-priority request, (2) expense category pages, (3) best software comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Backlink strategy and internal linking structure improvements to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Completed 40+ business credit card articles, awaiting review before going live](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Shifting focus to content refreshes and new priorities due to competitor (Brex) success](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Brex using Growth-X system, replicating Ramp's strategy with great results](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Decision to fully replace underperforming content (page 2 or lower) rather than just updating](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### SEO Performance and Priorities

  - [High-value keywords: each visit worth \~$40 in closed spend ($4 revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Priority 1: Ali's high-priority request (unspecified in transcript)](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Priority 2: Expense category pages](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Priority 3: Best software comparisons project (pending data finalization)](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Success story shared: previous project increased traffic from 20k to 500k in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Approach: Rewrite entire articles, identify primary/secondary keywords, optimize headings](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Retain old URLs unless severe mismatch, as they have existing authority](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

### Technical SEO and Site Structure

  - [Plans to split branded corporate blog from main content](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Updating footer with recent content](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Creating product page equivalents with dedicated nav spot](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Considering new domain for best software comparisons (potential for thousands of pages)](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Backlink and Internal Linking Strategy

  - [Jimmy to coordinate backlink exchange efforts](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Improve internal linking structure pointing to specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Luke working on splitting branded corporate blog and adjusting footer links](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Per Diem Content Performance

  - [Positive results noted after just one week](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Plans to add data on how companies configure per diem settings in Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### Digital PR and Spicy Content Ideas

  - [Suggestion to create attention-grabbing content for digital PR purposes](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Example: Kanye West's rental property insurance costs](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Leveraging transaction data for unique content angles (e.g., pumpkin spice latte trends)](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### SEO Challenges

  - [Cannibalization issues causing ranking drops for entire topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Investigating causes of ranking drops post-Google updates (e.g., expense policy template)](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Using Profound AI tool to analyze LLM impact on content parsing (first 300 words crucial)](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Begin work on Ali's high-priority request](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Start creating expense category pages](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Finalize data for best software comparisons project](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Implement backlink and internal linking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Monitor and adapt to AI/LLM impacts on content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Investigate and address cannibalization issues in content](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Consider creating "versus" and alternative comparison content for business credit cards](https://fathom.video/share/h9N1-J83-7mxe_rcYE1Ueyw1yedQxFHz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

action_items.description: Start content refreshes for page 2/bottom page 1 rankings. Focus on full replacements while keeping URLs. Begin with Ali's suggested page.
Proceed with creating expense category pages as second priority after content refreshes.
Send list of Brex URLs to Jimmy for competitor analysis and potential backlink strategy.
